ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the trial */,
  "company_sponsor" TEXT /* Company or sponsor of the trial */,
  "trial_phase" TEXT /* Phase of the trial (e.g., Phase I, II, III) */,
  "treated_organism" TEXT /* Organism being treated (e.g., Humans, Animals) */,
  "genetic_modification" TEXT /* Description of the genetic modification */,
  "trial_status" TEXT /* Status of the trial (e.g., Recruiting, Active, Completed) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the trial began */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the trial is expected to end */,
  "funding_amount" TEXT /* Total funding amount for the trial */,
  "lead_researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead researcher for the trial */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution where the trial is conducted */,
  "ethical_approval_status" TEXT /* Status of ethical approval (e.g., Approved, Pending, Rejected) */,
  "ethical_approval_date" TEXT /* Date when ethical approval was granted */,
  "publication_status" TEXT /* Status of trial results publication (e.g., Not Published, In Review, Published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_company_sponsor FOREIGN KEY ("company_sponsor") REFERENCES companies ("company_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_lead_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the company's website */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the company */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "research_focus" TEXT /* Main research focus of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution where the researcher is affiliated */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the researcher */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Areas of research interest */,
  "publications" INTEGER /* Number of publications by the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the institution */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the institution */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the institution */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the institution's website */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the institution was founded */,
  "research_focus" TEXT /* Main research focus of the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the participant is enrolled in */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the participant */,
  "disease" TEXT /* Disease or condition being treated */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the participant enrolled in the trial */,
  "withdrawal_date" TEXT /* Date when the participant withdrew from the trial (if applicable) */,
  "consent_status" TEXT /* Status of participant's consent (e.g., Given, Withdrawn) */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Summary of the participant's medical history */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_participants_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genetic_modifications" (
  "modification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genetic modification */,
  "modification_name" TEXT /* Name of the genetic modification */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genetic modification */,
  "technique" TEXT /* Technique used for genetic modification (e.g., CRISPR, TALEN) */,
  "target_gene" TEXT /* Gene targeted by the modification */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Detailed methodology used for the genetic modification */,
  "safety_profile" TEXT /* Summary of the safety profile of the genetic modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("modification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment outcome */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the treatment (e.g., success, failure, adverse event) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the treatment outcome */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date of the next follow-up for the participant */,
  "adverse_events" TEXT /* Description of any adverse events */,
  "efficacy_rating" TEXT /* Rating of the treatment efficacy (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments on the outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_outcomes_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_outcomes_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES trial_participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial update */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., protocol amendment, trial pause) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "responsible_researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher responsible for the update */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Status of the update approval (e.g., Approved, Pending, Rejected) */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was approved */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments on the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_updates_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_updates_responsible_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("responsible_researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, reviewer, administrator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date and time of the last activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., Active, Inactive, Suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device accessing the system */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique session ID for the user's session */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)
